ab: rasun cami ni papsibaq i aangayan cu qaqasinu cu sawni’, tibalung cami i balihun mabaynay cu aangay.
ch: 今天老師帶我們去動物園，我們在門口排隊買票。
en: Today the teacher took us to the zoo, and we lined up at the gate to buy tickets.

ab: mawp cami aangayan cu qaqasinu laru, kumaal i papsibaq maha, “pug ga kakbahneq, sug ga quruquru’, angay nanak cimu.”
ch: 進入動物園後，老師說:「前面是鳥類，後面是蛇類，大家自己參觀。」
en: After entering the zoo, the teacher said, "There are birds in the front and snakes in the back, so you can visit them yourself."

ab: kaicuun mu ku quru’, kahi’ kuwing ini’ kitaal cu quruquru’.
ch: 我會怕蛇，所以我不看蛇類。
en: I'm afraid of snakes, so I don't look at snakes.

ab: payux ku talan mu ka kabahneq, manbahaag ca babaw na kahuneq, manbahaag i kiya manbahaag i runi, talan mu uwi ku puuk ka kiya i maqilaap ca kuug na kahuneq.
ch: 我看到了很多鳥，他們在樹上飛來飛去，還有看到貓頭鷹在樹洞裡睡覺。
en: I saw a lot of birds flying around in the trees and saw owls sleeping in tree hollows.

ab: kiya a tasiyang, ramayi’ ru wakli’ i aangayan cu qaqasinu, iqaat kuwing minitaal na’ aring cunga’ cu qaqasinu ka hani, talan sawni’ laru maqas cubalay a qisleq.
ch: 動物園裡有大象、馬和老虎，我從前沒有看過這些動物，今天看到了真的很開心。
en: There are elephants, horses and tigers in the zoo. I have never seen these animals before. I was really happy to see them today.

ab: payux a ingal mu ka qalimu’ na qariwal, papkitaal mu i yaba’ ki yaya’.
ch: 我拍了很多照片，給爸爸媽媽看。
en: I took a lot of pictures and showed them to my parents.

ab: paglu kuwing ki yaba’, yaya’ muwah i babaw niya’.
ch: 下次要跟爸爸媽媽一起來。
en: Next time I will come with my parents.
